= returns.copy()\n","data = df[['Oil_Brent', 'Chevron', 'ExxonMobil', 'Tupras']]\n","model = VAR(data)\n","results = model.fit(maxlags=5)\n","print(results.summary())\n","print(\"\\n===== GRANGER CAUSALITY ====\")\n","stocks = ['Chevron', 'ExxonMobil', 'Tupras']\n","for stock in stocks:\n","    print(f\"\\nOil → {stock}\")\n","    grangercausalitytests(data[['Oil_Brent', stock]], maxlag=5, name 'returns' is not defined"]}]},{"cell_type":"code","source":["!pip install arch\n","\n","import pandas as pd\n","import numpy as np\n","import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n","from arch import arch_model\n","dcc_data = returns[['Oil_Brent', 'Tupras']].dropna() * 100\n","garch_oil = arch_model(dcc_data['Oil_Brent'], vol='Garch', p=1, q=1)\n","res_oil = garch_oil.fit(disp='off')\n","garch_tupras = arch_model(dcc_data['Tupras'], vol='Garch', p=1, q=1)\n","res_tupras = garch_tupras.fit(disp='off')\n","std_oil = res_oil.std_resid\n","std_tupras = res_tupras.std_resid\n","std_resid = pd.concat([std_oil, std_tupras], axis=1).dropna()\n","std_resid.columns = ['Oil_Brent', 'Tupras']\n","a = 0.05\n","b = 0.90\n","Q_bar = std_resid.cov().values\n","Q_t = Q_bar.copy()\n","dcc_corr = []\n","for i in range(len(std_resid)):\n","    e = std_resid.iloc[i].values.reshape(-1, 1)\n","    Q_t = (1 - a - b) * Q_bar + a * (e @ e.T) + b * Q_t\n","    D_inv = np.diag(1 / np.sqrt(np.diag(Q_t)))\n","    R_t = D_inv @ Q_t @ D_inv\n","    dcc_corr.append(R_t[0, 1])\n","dcc_corr = pd.Series(dcc_corr, index=std_resid.index)\n","print(\"Average Dynamic Correlation:\", dcc_corr.mean())\n","print(\"Minimum Dynamic Correlation:\", dcc_corr.min())\n","print(\"Maximum Dynamic Correlation:\", dcc_corr.max())\n","plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n","plt.plot(dcc_corr)\n","plt.axhline(dcc_corr.mean(), linestyle='--')\n","plt.title(\"DCC-GARCH Dynamic Correlation: Oil Brent vs Tupras\")\n","plt.xlabel(\"Date\")\n","plt.ylabel(\"Dynamic Correlation\")\n","plt.show()"],"metadata":{"colab":{"base_uri":"https://localhost:8080/","height":618},"collapsed":true,"id":"b-TDgPjQiHi3","executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1777908810454,"user_tz":-180,"elapsed":63854,"user":{"displayName":"Mert 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"],"image/png":"\n"},"metadata":{}}]},{"cell_type":"code","source":["import pandas as pd\n","import numpy as np\n","from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error\n","from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor\n","from statsmodels.tsa.statespace.sarimax import SARIMAX\n","from statsmodels.tsa.holtwinters import ExponentialSmoothing\n","df = returns.copy()\n","y = df['Tupras']\n","X = df[['Oil_Brent']]\n","split = int(len(df)*0.8)\n","y_train, y_test = y[:split], y[split:]\n","X_train, X_test = X[:split], X[split:]\n","sarimax = SARIMAX(y_train, exog=X_train, order=(1,0,1))\n","sarimax_fit = sarimax.fit(disp=False)\n","sarimax_pred = sarimax_fit.forecast(steps=len(y_test), exog=X_test)\n","rmse_sarimax = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test, sarimax_pred))\n","ets = ExponentialSmoothing(y_train, trend='add')\n","ets_fit = ets.fit()\n","ets_pred = ets_fit.forecast(len(y_test))\n","rmse_ets = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test, ets_pred))\n","df_ml = df.copy()\n","df_ml['Oil_lag1'] = df_ml['Oil_Brent'].shift(1)\n","df_ml['Tupras_lag1'] = df_ml['Tupras'].shift(1)\n","df_ml = df_ml.dropna()\n","X_ml = df_ml[['Oil_Brent','Oil_lag1','Tupras_lag1']]\n","y_ml = df_ml['Tupras']\n","split_ml = int(len(df_ml)*0.8)\n","X_train_ml, X_test_ml = X_ml[:split_ml], X_ml[split_ml:]\n","y_train_ml, y_test_ml = y_ml[:split_ml], y_ml[split_ml:]\n","rf = RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=100, random_state=42)\n","rf.fit(X_train_ml, y_train_ml)\n","rf_pred = rf.predict(X_test_ml)\n","rmse_ml = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test_ml, rf_pred))\n","print(\"RMSE RESULTS\")\n","print(\"------------------------\")\n","print(\"SARIMAX:\", rmse_sarimax)\n","print(\"ETS:\", rmse_ets)\n","print(\"ML (Random Forest):\", rmse_ml)"],"metadata":{"colab":{"base_uri":"https://localhost:8080/"},"id":"QSzEKmoenUfG","executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1777909328348,"user_tz":-180,"elapsed":6606,"user":{"displayName":"Mert
